zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Greystoke於1162年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾格利斯索普時，她的父親Ranulph Greystoke33歲，母親Amabel Balliol28歲。她和Henry FitzHervey of Ravensworth至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1213年在英國英格蘭越可爾拉文斯沃斯享年51歲，埋葬在英國越可爾易亞斯特 維頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Greystoke于1162年出生在英国英格兰越可爾格利斯索普时，她的父亲Ranulph Greystoke33岁，母亲Amabel Balliol28岁。她和Henry FitzHervey of Ravensworth至少有3个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1213年在英国英格兰越可爾拉文斯沃斯享年51岁，埋葬在英国越可爾易亞斯特 維頓。

nameMeanings.name: Greystoke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Graystock
meanings: English: locative name, from Greystoke (Cumb), recorded as Graystock in 1291.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Greystoke was born in 1162, in Grimesthorpe, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Ranulph Greystoke, was 33 and her mother, Amabel Balliol, was 28. She had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Henry FitzHervey of Ravensworth. She died in 1213, in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 51, and was buried in East Witton, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Greystoke est née en 1162, à Grimesthorpe, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ranulph Greystoke, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Amabel Balliol, avait 28 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Henry FitzHervey of Ravensworth. Elle est décédée en 1213, à Ravensworth, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterrée à East Witton, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Greystoke 1162 in Grimesthorpe, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ranulph Greystoke 33 und ihre Mutter Amabel Balliol 28. Sie hatte mit Henry FitzHervey of Ravensworth mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1213 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in East Witton, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Greystoke è nata il nel 1162 nel Grimesthorpe, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Ranulph Greystoke, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Amabel Balliol, aveva 28 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Henry FitzHervey of Ravensworth. Morì nel 1213, nel Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolta a East Witton, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Greystokeが1162年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアグリメスソルペで生まれた時，父Ranulph Greystokeは33歳，母Amabel Balliolは28歳であった。彼女はHenry FitzHervey of Ravensworthとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1213年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアラベンスウオルスで51歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアエアスト ウィットオンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Greystoke(이)가 1162년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 그라임스소에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ranulph Greystoke(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Amabel Balliol(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 Henry FitzHervey of Ravensworth(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1213년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 레이븐스워스에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 이스트 윗튼에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Greystoke nasceu em 1162, em Grimesthorpe, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Ranulph Greystoke, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Amabel Balliol, tinha 28 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Henry FitzHervey of Ravensworth. Ela faleceu em 1213, em Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 51 anos, e foi sepultada em East Witton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Greystoke родилась в 1162 г. в местности гриместаурп, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Ranulph Greystoke было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Amabel Balliol, 28. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Henry FitzHervey of Ravensworth. Она умерла в 1213 г. в местности равенсворт, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 51 год и была похоронена в местности эаст виттон, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Greystoke nació en 1162, en Grimesthorpe, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Ranulph Greystoke, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Amabel Balliol, tenía 28 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con Henry FitzHervey of Ravensworth. Murió en 1213, en Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultada en East Witton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
